title: Is Unstructured Data The Key To Successful AI Deployments?
summary: A podcast discussion from Hyland CommunityLIVE 2026 featuring Hyland leadership and Erie Insurance executives arguing that unstructured data is essential for successful agentic AI deployments in enterprises. The speakers discuss how proper use of unstructured data context helps AI pilots avoid common pitfalls like token misallocation.
writeup: Recorded at Hyland CommunityLIVE 2026, this podcast brings together Hyland leadership and Erie Insurance executives to argue that unstructured data is essential to successful agentic AI deployments in enterprises. The discussion centers on how supplying proper unstructured data context helps AI pilots avoid common failure modes, including token misallocation. The throughline: enterprise AI agents depend on context management drawn from unstructured sources, not just tabular data.
